title: Slloth's Casino Official
description: An optional lore and rp create mod origins based smp for vtubers and pngtubers who need people to collab with or make friends! this project has many mods mostly for optimization- big thanks to ttv/corneredcube for helping optimize this!
body:
Modpack for Casino SMP.
Contains create elements, adventure, and roleplay.

The modpack itself has plenty QoL mods as well as plenty of create mod and addons, the goal initially was to do lore and rp but I opted for optional, the new main goal is to get streamers to collab such as fellow pngtubers like myself, I've been working with another pngtuber to get this modpack optimized and have a bunch of unique things, another staple is the origins mod and its extension, can be tied into lore and rp but again lrp is optional. - Slloth

When making the pack, I made sure to make it as optimized as possible for potato pcs, although it requires a bit of RAM and disabling certain client-sided mods. I also wanted to account for all types of players, the pack was originally heavily create-based, but I wanted to incorporate the different playstyles (ie fighter, explorer, builder, farmer). - Cube



[Bliss shader DH compatible](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader)
